scripts.render:before-after: npx remotion render src/index.ts BeforeAfterReveal out/before-after-reel.mp4
scripts.render:timeline: npx remotion render src/index.ts TimelineSlider out/timeline-reel.mp4
scripts.render:walkthrough: npx remotion render src/index.ts FullWalkthrough out/full-walkthrough.mp4
scripts.render:before-after-square: npx remotion render src/index.ts BeforeAfterReveal-Square out/before-after-square.mp4
scripts.render:timeline-square: npx remotion render src/index.ts TimelineSlider-Square out/timeline-square.mp4
scripts.render:pro-goals: npx remotion render src/index.ts ProGoalFlows out/pro-goals-reel.mp4
scripts.render:pro-goals-square: npx remotion render src/index.ts ProGoalFlows-Square out/pro-goals-square.mp4
scripts.render:all: npm run render:before-after && npm run render:timeline && npm run render:walkthrough && npm run render:pro-goals && npm run render:before-after-square && npm run render:timeline-square && npm run render:pro-goals-square
